prd.name: Full Feature
prd.overview: A complete PRD with multiple requirements, bugs, and UI reviews.

requirement.name: Display
requirement.description: The main display requirement covering how content appears.
requirement.rule: The list shows all items in order.

requirement.name: Interaction
requirement.rule: Tapping an item navigates to detail.
Swiping left reveals a delete action.

ui_review.finding: Cell spacing does not match Figma (8pt vs 12pt).

bug.current: Scrolling quickly through the list causes a crash.
bug.steps: 1. Open the list view 2. Scroll rapidly up and down 3. Observe crash after ~20 items

bug.current: Swiping to delete removes the wrong item.
bug.expected: Swiping to delete removes the swiped item.
bug.steps: 1. Open the list 2. Swipe left on item 3 3. Tap delete 4. Observe item 4 is deleted instead
